name: Using Multiple Product Barcodes
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can improve scanning flexibility and accommodate supplier variations through multiple barcode support in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": ", which enables associating additional barcodes with products beyond the primary Supplier SKU. This barcode versatility helps retail operators handle different pack sizes, supplier variations, or legacy codes, with effective multiple barcode use typically improving POS scanning efficiency and reducing product lookup time across Australian retail operations."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Multiple barcode functionality in "}, {"text": "Retail Express", "bold": true}, {"text": " enables retail operators to configure alternative barcodes for the same product, helping ensure successful scanning regardless of which barcode variation customers present at checkout. This barcode flexibility helps ensure your retail operations can efficiently process transactions while accommodating product variations and simplifying the customer checkout experience."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products often come with different barcodes for various packaging or supplier purposes. This guide provides steps to configure and manage multiple barcodes for a single product, ensuring seamless identification and scanning across all relevant contexts."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If your supplier uses different barcodes for the same product, you can store multiple barcodes for a product in Retail Express (so you can still find your product regardless of which barcode you scan)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Adding Multiple Barcodes"}], "data-id": "adding-multiple-barcodes"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To add an additional barcode:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Edit a product", "bold": true}, {"text": " using "}, {"text": "Product Search & Management"}, {"text": " or the Product PLU look up box (top right-hand corner of Back Office)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Barcodes", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scan or type", "bold": true}, {"text": " the Barcode into the blank field"}, {"text": "\n\n"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The Barcode needs to be unique i.e the same code cannot be used for more than one product"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Enter ", "bold": true}, {"text": "or the"}, {"text": " +", "bold": true}, {"text": " symbol"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The new barcode will be added to the list"}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000qWrQTEA0.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000qWrQTEA0.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "Using multiple product barcodes.gif"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\ud83d\udccb"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Notes"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ":"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can have a "}, {"text": "maximum of 20 barcodes", "bold": true}, {"text": " per product"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You will still be required to enter a Supplier SKU barcode for your product (this is the main code used to display in reports etc)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Creating products via an API will be validated to ensure the barcode doesn't conflict with any additional Barcodes in Retail Express"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To use a barcode against another product you will need to "}, {"text": "delete ", "bold": true}, {"text": "the barcode (disabling will just prevent the code from being scanned)."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Where to scan barcodes"}], "data-id": "where-to-scan-barcodes"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can scan barcodes in a number of places in Retail Express. Below we've listed  where the feature is Available and Not Available:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Available Fields"}], "data-id":
